records.ety: [L. exponens, -entis, p. pr. of exponere to put out, set forth, expose. See Expound.]

defs: A number, letter, or any quantity written on the right hand of and above another quantity, and denoting how many times the latter is repeated as a factor to produce the power indicated
notes: thus a2 denotes the second power, and ax the xth power, of a (2 and x being the exponents). A fractional exponent, or index, is used to denote the root of a quantity. Thus, a⅓ denotes the third or cube root of a.

defs: One who, or that which, stands as an index or representative; as, the leader of a party is the exponent of its principles.
one who explains, expounds, or interprets.
